expectations.text: The feature-design skill was invoked via the Skill tool
expectations.evidence: Transcript shows complete feature-design process: EARS mapping, consistency check, draft, self-review, quality review

expectations.text: Scenarios describe behavior declaratively, not imperatively
expectations.evidence: Feature file uses domain language: 'filter matches a subset', 'emptying the filter restores', 'filter ignores case'. No UI selectors or implementation details.

expectations.text: A scenario for empty filter (all nodes visible) exists
expectations.evidence: Scenario 4: 'Emptying the filter restores normal display' and Scenario 5: 'Filter is empty on initial load'

expectations.text: A scenario for partial text matching exists
A scenario for no matching nodes exists
Scenarios use domain language (Knoten, Label, Filter) not technical jargon
expectations.evidence: Feature file uses consistent domain terms throughout. No DOM, CSS, or event handler references.

expectations.text: A quality review of the feature files was performed
expectations.evidence: Transcript Step 5: Self-review found and fixed conjunctive scenario. Step 6: Fresh-agent quality review (10 checks) found and added special characters edge case.
